articles.author: Frederic Bourigault
articles.title: New spacecraft will watch Earth's shield take the hit as solar storms come roaring in - Phys.org
articles.description: A joint European-Chinese spacecraft is set to blast off Tuesday to investigate what happens when extreme winds and giant explosions of plasma shot out from the sun slam into Earth's magnetic shield.
articles.content: A joint European-Chinese spacecraft is set to blast off Tuesday to investigate what happens when extreme winds and giant explosions of plasma shot out from the sun slam into Earth's magnetic shield.… [+3965 chars]
